data.name: On0
data.value: On {0}

data.name: LucidMP
data.value: Set value for your MP to be at or under for this feature to work

data.name: BossOnlyHpPercent
data.value: Bosses Only. Stop using at Enemy HP %.

data.name: BossEncounterNonBossHpPercent
data.value: Boss Encounter Non Bosses. Stop using at Enemy HP %.

data.name: NonBossHpPercent
data.value: Non boss encounter. Stop using at Enemy HP %.

data.name: DoTSecondsRemainingZeroDisable
data.value: Seconds remaining before reapplying the DoT. Set to Zero to disable this check.

data.name: TwoTargetDotting
data.value: Two target dotting

data.name: TwoTargetDottingDescription
data.value: Will maintain Damage over time spells on two targets if applicable.

data.name: StopEnemyHpPercent
data.value: Stop using at Enemy HP %. Set to Zero to disable this check.

data.name: EnemyTypeCheck
data.value: Select what kind of enemies the HP check should be applied to:

data.name: NonBosses
data.value: Non-Bosses

data.name: AllEnemies
data.value: All Enemies

data.name: HPCheckNonBosses
data.value: Only applies the HP check above to non-bosses.

data.name: HPCheckAllEnemies
data.value: Applies the HP check above to all enemies.

data.name: NormalTargeting
data.value: Normal Targeting

data.name: SelfOnly
data.value: Self Only

data.name: NonBossEncountersOnly
data.value: Non-boss Encounters Only

data.name: AllContent
data.value: All Content

data.name: StopSeconds
data.value: Seconds remaining before reapplying (0 = Do not reapply early)

data.name: MaxTargetsMultiDot
data.value: Maximum number of targets to employ multi-dotting

data.name: IncludeShields
data.value: Include Shields in HP Percent Sliders

data.name: StopFriendlyHpPercentZero
data.value: Stop using when below HP %. Set to Zero to disable this check

data.name: StopFriendlyHpPercent100
data.value: Start using when below HP %. Set to 100 to disable this check

data.name: ChargePool
data.value: How many charges to retain for manual use. Set to 0 to disable this check.

data.name: OnlyWeave
data.value: Only Weave

data.name: Action_Priority
data.value: {0} Priority:

data.name: Use0
data.value: Use {0}

data.name: DontUse0
data.value: Don't Use {0}

data.name: SelectWhatKindOfContentThisOptionAppliesTo
data.value: Select what kind of content this option applies to:

data.name: AllContentDescription
data.value: Applies to all content in the game.

data.name: BossOnlyContent
data.value: Boss Only Content

data.name: BossOnlyDescription
data.value: Only applies in instances where you directly fight a boss. Excludes many A Realm Reborn & Heavensward raids that include trash.

data.name: Priority
data.value: Priority:

data.name: ApplyToAll0
data.value: Applies options to all of these: {0}

data.name: ApplyOnlyTo0
data.value: Applies options to {0} only.
